zh.lifeSummary: 當Gautier III de Villebéon於大約1207年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內維爾貝時，他的父親Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours23歲，母親Isabelle de TANCARVILLE28歲。他和Alix de Vierzon至少有1個兒子。他去世於1239年9月27日享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gautier III de Villebéon于大约1207年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內維爾貝时，他的父亲Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours23岁，母亲Isabelle de TANCARVILLE28岁。他和Alix de Vierzon至少有1个儿子。他去世于1239年9月27日享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gautier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gautier III de Villebéon was born about 1207, in Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, was 23 and his mother, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Alix de Vierzon. He died on 27 September 1239, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gautier III de Villebéon est né environ 1207, à Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Alix de Vierzon. Il est décédé le 27 septembre 1239, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gautier III de Villebéon um 1207 in Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours 23 und seine Mutter Isabelle de TANCARVILLE 28. Er hatte mit Alix de Vierzon mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 27. September 1239 im Alter von 33 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gautier III de Villebéon è nato il circa 1207 nel Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Alix de Vierzon. Morì il 27 settembre 1239, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gautier III de Villebéonが約1207年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンヴィレブeオンで生まれた時，父Adam I De Villebeon De Nemoursは23歳，母Isabelle de TANCARVILLEは28歳であった。彼はAlix de Vierzonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1239年9月27日に33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gautier III de Villebéon(이)가 대략 1207년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 비레브e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de TANCARVILLE(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Alix de Vierzon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1239년 9월 27일 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gautier III de Villebéon nasceu aproximadamente 1207, em Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Alix de Vierzon. Ele faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1239, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gautier III de Villebéon родился около 1207 г. в местности виллебeон, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alix de Vierzon. Он умер 27 сентября 1239 г. в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gautier III de Villebéon nació aproximadamente 1207, en Villebéon, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Alix de Vierzon. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1239, a la edad de 33 años.
